title: Junior Business Development Manager at Jones Lang LaSalle

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Jones Lang LaSalle
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!
